text:
I used to wake up, grab my phone, and stare at a blinking cursor. What do I post? Every single morning, the same question.

One afternoon I stopped answering it. Tied the official Threads API to free tools, fed it my past posts, and walked away.

Two hours later, the setup was done. The account posts daily, reads its own analytics, and writes better tomorrow.

I haven’t opened the draft screen since. The system outlearned me.
